content:
Table Name:
advisor

Columns:
s_ID (VARCHAR(5)), i_ID (VARCHAR(5))

Primary Keys:
s_ID

Relationships:

advisor.i_ID -> instructor.ID
advisor.s_ID -> student.ID

Table Name:
classroom

Columns:
building (VARCHAR(15)), room_number (VARCHAR(7)), capacity (NUMERIC(4, 0))

Primary Keys:
building, room_number

Relationships:

Table Name:
course

Columns:
course_id (VARCHAR(8)), title (VARCHAR(50)), dept_name (VARCHAR(20)), credits (NUMERIC(2, 0))

Primary Keys:
course_id

Relationships:

course.dept_name -> department.dept_name

Table Name:
department

Columns:
dept_name (VARCHAR(20)), building (VARCHAR(15)), budget (NUMERIC(12, 2))

Primary Keys:
dept_name

Relationships:

Table Name:
instructor

Columns:
ID (VARCHAR(5)), name (VARCHAR(20)), dept_name (VARCHAR(20)), salary (NUMERIC(8, 2))

Primary Keys:
ID

Relationships:

instructor.dept_name -> department.dept_name

Table Name:
prereq

Columns:
course_id (VARCHAR(8)), prereq_id (VARCHAR(8))

Primary Keys:
course_id, prereq_id

Relationships:

prereq.course_id -> course.course_id
prereq.prereq_id -> course.course_id

Table Name:
section

Columns:
course_id (VARCHAR(8)), sec_id (VARCHAR(8)), semester (VARCHAR(6)), year (NUMERIC(4, 0)), building (VARCHAR(15)), room_number (VARCHAR(7)), time_slot_id (VARCHAR(4))

Primary Keys:
course_id, sec_id, semester, year

Relationships:

section.course_id -> course.course_id
section.building,room_number -> classroom.building,room_number

Table Name:
student

Columns:
ID (VARCHAR(5)), name (VARCHAR(20)), dept_name (VARCHAR(20)), tot_cred (NUMERIC(3, 0))

Primary Keys:
ID

Relationships:

student.dept_name -> department.dept_name

Table Name:
takes

Columns:
ID (VARCHAR(5)), course_id (VARCHAR(8)), sec_id (VARCHAR(8)), semester (VARCHAR(6)), year (NUMERIC(4, 0)), grade (VARCHAR(2))

Primary Keys:
ID, course_id, sec_id, semester, year

Relationships:

takes.course_id,sec_id,semester,year -> section.course_id,sec_id,semester,year
takes.ID -> student.ID

Table Name:
teaches

Columns:
ID (VARCHAR(5)), course_id (VARCHAR(8)), sec_id (VARCHAR(8)), semester (VARCHAR(6)), year (NUMERIC(4, 0))

Primary Keys:
ID, course_id, sec_id, semester, year

Relationships:

teaches.course_id,sec_id,semester,year -> section.course_id,sec_id,semester,year
teaches.ID -> instructor.ID

Table Name:
time_slot

Columns:
time_slot_id (VARCHAR(4)), day (VARCHAR(1)), start_hr (NUMERIC(2)), start_min (NUMERIC(2)), end_hr (NUMERIC(2)), end_min (NUMERIC(2))

Primary Keys:
time_slot_id, day, start_hr, start_min

Relationships:
